title: Travel health professionals - Canada.ca
content:
## Travel health professionals
Guidance for travel-related diseases and vaccination

## Services and information

### National Advisory Committee on Immunization (NACI)
Statements, publications, meetings, workplan, methods and process, terms of reference

### Committee to Advise on Tropical Medicine and Travel (CATMAT)
Statements, publications, membership, terms of reference, workplan

### Become a designated yellow fever vaccination centre
Forms to apply, terminate or change an existing centre, order copies of the international certificate of vaccination or prophylaxis

### Canadian Malaria Network
Medical access to artesunate or quinine for malaria treatment streamlined in Canada

### Travel medicine resources for health practitioners in Canada
Comprehensive resource list to aid, inform and educate Canadian health practitioners providing travel medicine services
- Public Health Agency of Canada
